name: smart-meeting-platform
description: Real-time communication platform for sign language conversion

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.start:build: echo "Use render.yaml or separate backend/frontend services; do not run docker-compose on Render."
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
